name: Swiss Potato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in their skins for 10 minutes, then drain.
2. Grate the potatoes into a mixing bowl using the coarse side of a grater.
3. Stir in the grated cheese, salt, and pepper.
4. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a pan and add onions when foaming.
5. Fry gently until soft, then add the onion to the potato mixture with cheese, salt, and pepper.
6. Clean the frying pan and line it with aluminum foil.
7. Shape the potato mixture into a circle on the foil.
8. Invert a serving platter over the potato cake and turn off the heat.
(Note: This recipe is not from Switzerland, but rather an adaptation.)
